---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect or unintended behaviour
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly and briefly.

## Execution Readiness

- [ ] This bug report is ready for deterministic implementation
- [ ] This bug report needs investigation before implementation

If investigation is still needed, consider converting this into a discovery/shaping issue or use the sections below to make the uncertainty explicit.

## Current Behaviour

Describe what currently happens.

## Expected Behaviour

Describe what should happen instead.

## Reproduction Steps

Provide the smallest reliable reproduction you can.

1.
2.
3.

## Scope and Impact

Describe:

- who or what is affected
- how serious the problem is
- whether the issue is isolated or broad

## Acceptance Criteria

List the criteria that determine whether the bug is fixed.

Examples:

- [ ] Reproduction no longer fails
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] Related behaviour remains unchanged

## Relevant Context

Add any relevant supporting material.

Examples:

- screenshots
- logs
- stack traces
- environment details
- related issues or PRs
- links to docs or code areas

## Validation Expectations

Describe how the fix should be validated.

Include both automated and manual validation where relevant.

## Open Questions

List any unknowns that still need resolving before implementation.
